response.justification: Wei Chen is a strong, versatile senior engineer with nearly two decades of production experience, solid TypeScript/Python-adjacent skills, cloud exposure (AWS CDK), and recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his AI/GenAI experience appears limited to roughly the past year. There is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, and no clear track record of leading customer-facing technical discovery at enterprise scale, which are core to this Staff FDE position.
strengths: 18+ years of broad production engineering experience across web, backend, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems
Recent hands-on MCP code-generator and AI-agent infrastructure work directly relevant to agentic workflows
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing record (workshops, courses, coding dojos) suited to a customer-facing role
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions (~1 year of GenAI-related work)
No evidence of RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation/observability, or multi-agent framework experience
Limited demonstrated enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or discovery-session ownership
